title: Penelope Keith: the most spectacular sitcom snob ever to grace our screens

title: I had fallen out of love with fiction. Now I’m back in its arms – and relishing every minute | Zoe Williams
summary: Novels were starting to seem like a thing of the past for me, until I found a book I couldn’t put down. Is there anything better?I never decided to stop reading novels; I just fell out of the loop. You need to meet a few basic conditions to disappear into a story: a medium amount of patience, some free time, enough inner peace that a made-up person’s tribulations are more engrossing than your own.
